prestazioni: 3.5L twin-turbo V6 (V35A-FTS) forced induction upgrade with Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (84mm compressor, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe system by HKS, supporting 650+ WHP on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU reflash and upgraded fuel system (Dual Walbro 450LPH pumps, ID1700x injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel surge tank)

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: Toyota Racing Development (TRD) 8-speed automatic transmission with a Level 10 torque converter, PTT Performance billet flexplate, and a custom 300M steel driveshaft with CV-style joints to handle increased power delivery to the TRD Pro rear differential (4.30:1 gear ratio) and a Quaife ATB helical LSD

Suspension overhaul with Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (adjustable compression/rebound damping, 20-way adjustable front, 18-way rear) paired with SPL Parts front and rear adjustable sway bars (25mm front, 22mm rear), poly bushings, and a custom air ride setup by AccuAir E-Level II for on-demand ride height adjustment (optional track mode)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody conversion kit (Sequoia-specific fenders, side skirts, and rear bumper with integrated diffuser) finished in BASF RM Diamond White with a custom satin clear coat, paired with a Rocket Bunny GT-style front lip and rear wing (carbon fiber, 3-piece design with adjustable angle)

Custom 24-inch Rotiform LAS-R wheels (24x10.5 front, 24x12.5 rear) with a concave face, matte bronze finish, and Toyo R888R tires (295/30/24 front, 325/25/24 rear), wrapped in a custom 3M Gloss Black roof and mirror caps with a satin gold pinstripe accent

Full interior rework by Katzkin featuring diamond-stitched Nappa leather (two-tone black and tan) with Alcantara headliner, custom carbon fiber trim (door cards, center console, and dashboard inserts by Seibon), and a bespoke audio system by Focal (K2 Power 3-way components, Utopia Be tweeters, and a pair of Flax Evo subwoofers in a custom enclosure with a Mosconi 6.8 DSP amplifier)
